text: Why will the police have a difficult time?
zh: 为什么警察会很难应付?

text: The Greenwood Boys are a group of pop singers.
zh: 绿林男孩是一支流行歌手组合。

text: At present, they are visiting all parts of the country.
zh: 目前,他们正在全国各地巡演。

text: They will be arriving here tomorrow.
They will be coming by train and most of the young people in the town will be meeting them at the station.
zh: 他们将乘火车前来,镇上大部分年轻人都会到车站去接他们。

text: Tomorrow evening they will be singing at the Workers' Club.
zh: 明天晚上他们将在工人俱乐部演出。

text: The Greenwood Boys will be staying for five days.
During this time, they will give five performances.
zh: 在此期间,他们将举行五场演出。

text: As usual, the police will have a difficult time.
zh: 和往常一样,警察将会很难应付。

text: They will be trying to keep order.
It is always the same on these occasions.
zh: 每逢这种场合总是如此。
